##NAMES=Bussyite-(Ce)
##RRUFFID=R120059
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Ce,REE)_3_(Na,H_2_O)_6_MnSi_9_Be_5_(O,OH)_30_F_4_
##LOCALITY=Mont Saint-Hilaire, Rouville RCM, Montérégie, Québec, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Sprays of pale yellow, elongated crystals, associated with catapleiite, albite and aegirine
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120059
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
